step.title: Load artifact
step.action: Load the artifact and identify its claims, constraints, and decisions.
If PRD or architecture context exists, load them for cross-reference.

step.title: List ambiguities
step.action: List all ambiguities — places where the meaning is unclear, underspecified, or open to multiple interpretations.

step.title: Surface unstated assumptions
step.action: Surface unstated assumptions — things taken for granted without evidence or explicit justification.

step.title: Find conflicting requirements
step.action: Find conflicting requirements — places where goals, constraints, or decisions contradict each other.

step.title: Propose resolution options
step.action: For each issue, propose 2-3 resolution options with trade-offs clearly articulated.

step.title: Produce discussion report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with analysis findings and resolution options.
